response.justification: While James has extensive experience in software development across various languages and domains, his resume lacks direct evidence of deep expertise in Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, or enterprise frameworks like Spring. His recent roles focus heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and frontend/mobile development, with only tangential mentions of Java. Additionally, there is no indication of experience with IDE internals or language tooling, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Strong polyglot experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Proven track record in designing and delivering complex systems
Experience with CI/CD, testing methodologies, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in Java/Kotlin or JVM tooling
Lack of experience with enterprise frameworks (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) or application server integration
No visible background in IDE internals or language tooling, which are core to this role
